materials.title: Complete Guide to Video Production
materials.description: Master professional video production from pre-production to final delivery. Learn camera techniques, lighting, sound design, and post-production editing. Includes practical exercises and real-world examples.

materials.title: UI/UX Design Mastery
materials.description: Learn the fundamentals of user interface and experience design. Master Figma, prototyping, user research, accessibility, and design systems. Build a professional portfolio as you learn.

materials.title: JavaScript: The Complete Guide
materials.description: From beginner to advanced. Master JavaScript, ES6+, async programming, DOM manipulation, and modern frameworks. Includes hundreds of code examples and challenges.

materials.title: Motion Graphics with After Effects
materials.description: Create stunning animations and motion graphics. Learn keyframing, expressions, visual effects, and compositing. Master industry-standard techniques for broadcast and social media.

materials.title: Branding & Identity Design
materials.description: Build powerful brands from scratch. Learn logo design, color theory, typography, brand strategy, and visual identity systems. Real-world case studies included.

materials.title: Python for Data Science
materials.description: Learn Python programming for data analysis, visualization, and machine learning. Covers NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and introductory ML concepts.

materials.title: Audio Production & Sound Design
materials.description: Master audio recording, mixing, mastering, and sound design. Learn industry-standard DAWs, microphone techniques, and post-production audio.

materials.title: Web Design with Figma
materials.description: Learn web design from scratch using Figma. Master wireframing, prototyping, responsive design, and collaboration tools. Perfect for aspiring UI/UX designers.

materials.title: Full-Stack Web Development Bundle
materials.description: Complete web development ecosystem. Includes: HTML/CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, MongoDB, and 10 real-world projects. Save 40% compared to buying separately.

materials.title: Creative Media Production Pack
materials.description: Everything you need for professional media production. Includes: Video Production Guide, Motion Graphics Mastery, Audio Production, plus 50+ templates, presets, and sound effects. Save 35%.

materials.title: Design Resource Toolkit
materials.description: Ultimate design resource pack. Includes: UI/UX Design Mastery, Branding & Identity, Web Design with Figma, plus 100+ UI components, 50+ mockups, and font bundles. Save 30%.

materials.title: Cinematography & Lighting
materials.description: Master the art of visual storytelling. Learn camera angles, composition, lighting techniques, color grading, and shot design. Perfect for aspiring filmmakers.

materials.title: React: From Zero to Expert
materials.description: Master React.js including hooks, context, state management, routing, and performance optimization. Build real-world applications including an e-commerce site and dashboard.
